@graph.name: Precise Melasma Treatment in Malaysia for Lasting Clarity Without Rebound
@graph.description: Brown patches that fade then return, darken with heat and resist every cream. Nexus Clinic KL identifies your exact melasma subtype and builds a structured programme using Sylfirm X, Pico Laser and oral tranexamic acid. Book your free assessment today.
